---
title: Modern Terminal Workflows
author: HackerOne
date: 2024-02-27
description: Level up your terminal game with modern tools
tags: ["#terminal", "#productivity"]
---
Level up your terminal game with modern tools. The classic Unix philosophy of small, composable programs is more relevant than ever.

**Must-have tools:**
- ripgrep over grep
- fd over find
- bat over cat
- delta for better diffs
